title: The Mangrol and Manavadar (Administration of Property) Act, 1949
full_text: The Mangrol and Manavadar (Administration of Property) Act, 1949 मांगरोल तथा माणवदर (सम्‍पत्ति-प्रशासन)अधिनियम, 1949 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1949-2 Act Number: 2 Enactment Date: 1949-02-14 Act Year: 1949 Short Title: The Mangrol and Manavadar (Administration of Property) Act, 1949 Hindi Title: मांगरोल तथा माणवदर (सम्‍पत्ति-प्रशासन)अधिनियम, 1949 Long Title: An Act to provide for the vesting of certain properties belonging to the States of Mangrol and Manavadar in Kathiawar in the Managers of the said States. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 14-02-1949 Last Updated: 08-04-2019 Schedule 1. SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Mangrol and Manavadar (Administration of Property) Act, 1949 Show all section Section 1. Short title. Section 2. Definition. Section 3. Vesting of property in Manager. Section 4. Powers of Manager. Section 5. Payment to Manager to be a discharge of obligations. Section 6. Issue of duplicate securities. Section 7. Transfers otherwise than by Manager void. Section 8. Power to call for information. Section 9. Bar of jurisdiction of Court. Section 10. . Power of the Central Government to add to the Schedule. Section 11. Bar of legal proceedings. Section 12. Repeal. Schedule 1. SCHEDULE.
